name: iarsma
description: Iarsma — JMAP-native webmail built for agent/human collaboration. Monorepo root.
author: Brent Ellis <brent@r3motely.com>

scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist node_modules && cargo clean

pnpm.//: Security patches forced into transitive deps via overrides. We don't own the manifest entry — these arrived as Dependabot alerts on packages our parent deps pulled in. Each `overrides` entry below corresponds to one or more GHSAs; remove an entry once the parent dep ships a version that pulls in the patched range natively. As of 2026-05-09: hono → fixes GHSA-69xw, GHSA-9vqf, GHSA-p77w, GHSA-qp7p, GHSA-hm8q (pulled in by @modelcontextprotocol/sdk). fast-uri → fixes GHSA-q3j6, GHSA-v39h (via ajv from MCP SDK + Fastify). ip-address → fixes GHSA-v2v4 (via express-rate-limit from MCP SDK).
